descs.desc: If target has [Vibration], deal +(([Vibration] on target + [Vibration] Count on target)/2)% damage (max 20%)
coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 3 [Vibration]
[OnSucceedAttack] Trigger [VibrationExplosion]; then, reduce target's [Vibration] Count by 1

descs.desc:
If target has [Vibration], deal +(([Vibration] on target + [Vibration] Count on target)/2)% damage (max 25%)
- At 4+ highest Reson., deal +(5 + ([Vibration] on target + [Vibration] Count on target)/2)% damage instead (max 35%)
coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 3 [Vibration] and +2 [Vibration] Count
[OnSucceedAttack] Trigger [Switch_Vibration] into [VibrationEcho]
[OnSucceedAttack] Trigger [VibrationExplosion]; then, reduce target's [Vibration] Count by 1

2060611.name: Gloominess
2060611.desc: When this unit uses a Skill to trigger [VibrationExplosion] on an enemy, inflict 1 [AttackDown] and 2 [DefenseDown] on the enemy next turn. (3 times per turn, including E.G.O Skills)
